Maintainer.Profile: Independent, self-hosted MCP servers maintained by Ringosystems (Steeves and Associates). TractorBeeam365 MCP is a Model Context Protocol server for Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 (VB365): read-only backup review by default (configuration, health, protection-gap analysis, trends, and cloud immutability cross-check), plus an opt-in, confirm-token-gated, audited action and restore tier. Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or supported by Veeam Software or Microsoft.
